name: Croaker Croquettes One
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mixture thoroughly.
2. Shape into balls or patties.
3. Dip in egg wash prepared as for fillets.
4. Dip in breadcrumbs.
5. Fry in deep fat at 365 degrees F.
6. Serve with tomato sauce.
Note: Generalized recipe made specific for Croakers, Source: FISHES AND FISHING IN LOUISIANA published 1933, Recipe date: 01/17/33
